titleStmt.title: SII 27.143: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 143. (A.R. No. 514 of 1928-29.) SĀLIGRAMA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the prākāra of the Narasiṁhamūrti temple.

This record is dated Śaka 1390 (expired), 1391 (current), Sarvadhāri, Chaitra śu. 15, Monday. The Śaka year 1391 corresponds to the cyclic year Virōdhin and the details correspond to 1469, A.D., March 27.

It states that when Viṭhrasa-voḍeya was administering Bārakūrurājya under the orders of the king, the latter granted 250 kāṭi-gadyāṇa while Viṭharasa-voḍeya granted 500 kāṭi-gadyāṇa amounting in all to 300 ghaṭi-varāha-gadyāṇa from out of the siddhāya tax due from the village Kōṭa which is described as the bhaṇḍāra-sthaḷa of the royal place, at the request of the sixteen adhivāsis, Ten-thousand Mahājagattu and Voppuva-hegaḍe of Kōṭa, to the people of Kōṭa, for the merit of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayeṁ namaḥ . nirvighnamastu . namastuṁga śiraściṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē .
trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śā
ṁli vāhana śakavaruṣa 1390 saṁdu voṁdaneya varttamānada sarvadhāri saṁvatsarada
cayitra śudha 15 sōmavāradalu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara
śrī vīra pratāpa śrīvīra virūpākṣarāya mahārāyarū vijayanagari
ya siṁhvāsanadalū cittayisi duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipālakanāgi sakala varnnadha
rmāśrayaṁgaḷanu pratipālisutaṁ yida kāladalū Ā virūpākṣarāyara
nirūpadiṁda bārakūra rājyavanū viṭharasavoḍeyaru pratipālisuttaṁ yahali Ā
rāyarige śatrukṣaya mitrōrjita Āyurārōgya AyaśvaryyābhiUradhi yāgabēkeṁ
du Ā virūpākṣarāya mahārāyaru kōṭada grāma ha
dināṟu maṁdi Adhivāsigaḷu hattusāvira mahājagattu voppuvahegaḍe yiṁ
tī samastarū vijayanagarige baṁdalli nivage kuḷavakaḍidu dhāreyaneṟadu ba
rasikoṭa dharṁmmaśāsanadakramaveṁteṁdare naṁma Aramaneya bhaṁḍārasthalava
kōṭada grāmadalu Aramanege nīu teṟuva siddhāyada hoṁnina voḷage
nivage dhāreyaneṟadu koṭadu kāṭiga 250 viṭharasavoḍeyaru koṭa
du kāṭiga 500 Ubhayaṁ kāṭiga 750 kaṁ ghaṭivaraha ga 300 A
kṣāradalu yidē muṁnūṟu varahanu dharṁmavāgi dhāreyaneṟadu pā
lisidelu nīu niṁma saṁtānapāraṁpareyalū Ācaṁdrārka sthāyigaḷā
gi nīve Anubhavisi bahiri yeṁdu virūpākṣarāyarū viṭharasavoḍeyarū
kōṭada grāma hadināṟu nūṟa yippattu maṁdi Adhivāsigaḷu hattusāvira ma
hājagattu voppuva hegeḍe yiṁtivarige sahiraṁṇyōdaka dānadārāpūThe rest of the record is built in.
Digital edition of SII 27.143 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
